summary: P2-B1 daily batch rules pipeline (#303): services/scoring emits visual_layer AdvisorySignal per 20 KPI IDs (6 domains), ranks execution_layer workflow keys from synced #300 aggregates; Shop Status/CSAT have empty workflow_keys per scope alignment; no ML imports; 08:00 UTC schedule constants; 10/10 contract tests pass.

criticalFindings.description: No explicit contract test asserting Shop Status and CSAT KPI_WORKFLOW_KEYS are empty tuples; behavior verified via kpi_catalog definition and manual spot-check.
criticalFindings.suggestion: Add test_shop_status_and_csat_have_no_workflow_keys in follow-up if harness requires explicit grill coverage.

criticalFindings.description: resolvedDecisions omits Shop Status/CSAT no-workflow_keys grill decisions present in scope-alignment-issue-303.md; implementation honors scope.
criticalFindings.suggestion: Sync issue-context-cache resolvedDecisions on next prompt-cache refresh.

criticalFindings.description: return_rate_proxy uses order-level ratio from aggregates, not true 7d/30d windows documented in visual_layer examples.
criticalFindings.suggestion: Defer windowed return-rate computation to P2-B3 multi-endpoint KPI slice.

criticalFindings.description: Batch entry point has no structured logging or per-shop error isolation; acceptable for P2-B1 schedulable stub.
criticalFindings.suggestion: Add structured logging and per-shop try/except when Celery beat wiring lands.

interfaceChanges.description: Batch entry over active shops or explicit shop_ids list.
Emits visual_layer AdvisorySignal for all 20 KPI IDs from FeatureAggregateSnapshot.
Profile-gated execution_layer workflow ranking from advisory signals.
visual_layer one-line format: change · risk|opportunity · action.

mappings.criterion: Batch job runs on synced Postgres aggregates
Deterministic rules produce signals and ranked recommendations
Schedule aligns with phase-2-mvp.md (08:00 UTC scoring window)

reviewerSignoff.statement: Reviewed P2-B1 scoring pipeline against scope-alignment-issue-303; no blocking findings.

scopeChecks.notes: Rules-only scoring confined to backend/src/juli_backend/services/scoring/ and contract tests. P1.8 health_check not used as signal authority.
